name: PolyArc
summary: Representation of an arc segment of a two dimensional polygon/polyline.

properties.name: begIndex
properties.summary: Node index of one end point of the arc.

properties.name: endIndex
properties.summary: Node index of the other end point of the arc.

properties.name: arcAngle
properties.summary: Angle of the arc; it is positive, if the arc is on the right-hand side of the straight segment.
